characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Rip and Tear obliterates units that it reduces to 0 hp.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: If a unit with this trait is reduced to 0 hp, they are not slain, but instead gain 1 strength and remain at 0 hp, no matter how much damage they took. If they take any further damage at 0 hp, they are slain as normal.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Convert up to 3 negative tokens on self or adjacent allies to speed or strength tokens. Then this unit becomes curseproof until the start of its next turn.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 2-3

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Pull a unit in range 2 spaces. Effect (3+): Pull another unit. (5+): Pull another unit.

sharedRules.name: Berserk
sharedRules.description: After a berserk unit ACTs, it splashes (self) 1 damage, then discards a berserk token. This damage can’t be increased in any way. If this effect does not damage any other characters, it deals 1 damage to itself instead, ignoring armor. Berserk counts as a positive and a negative token.

sharedRules.name: Retaliation
sharedRules.description: After any ability resolves that damages this unit, this unit deals 1 damage back to the ability’s owner, even if this unit was slain.
